title: Platform Access — DIGI-METER
description: DIGI-METER adaptive digital competence assessment platform — currently in development. Register your institution for early access and pilot participation.

strings.source: An AI-supported self-assessment platform enabling learners to measure their digital competences against the DigComp 2.2 framework — with personalised feedback, educator dashboards, and institutional analytics.
strings.value: An AI-supported self-assessment platform enabling learners to measure their digital competences against the DigComp 2.2 framework — with personalised feedback, educator dashboards, and institutional analytics.

strings.source: A Complete Digital Competence Measurement Ecosystem
strings.value: A Complete Digital Competence Measurement Ecosystem

strings.source: DIGI-METER is being built as a web-based platform that covers the full digital competence measurement cycle — from individual learner self-assessment through to class-level educator dashboards and institution-level analytics. Every layer is grounded in the DigComp 2.2 framework and designed around privacy-by-design principles.
strings.value: DIGI-METER is being built as a web-based platform that covers the full digital competence measurement cycle — from individual learner self-assessment through to class-level educator dashboards and institution-level analytics. Every layer is grounded in the DigComp 2.2 framework and designed around privacy-by-design principles.

strings.source: All learner data is pseudonymised. Educators see only aggregated class-level data. Every component is GDPR-compliant and audited by Ergonact's ethics-by-design framework.
strings.value: All learner data is pseudonymised. Educators see only aggregated class-level data. Every component is GDPR-compliant and audited by Ergonact's ethics-by-design framework.

strings.source: The platform covers the full digital competence measurement cycle — from individual learner assessment through to institutional-level data and policy-ready reporting.
strings.value: The platform covers the full digital competence measurement cycle — from individual learner assessment through to institutional-level data and policy-ready reporting.

strings.source: Learners complete an adaptive digital competence assessment that adjusts question difficulty and focus based on their responses. The AI engine maps answers to DigComp 2.2 proficiency levels across all five competence areas.
strings.value: Learners complete an adaptive digital competence assessment that adjusts question difficulty and focus based on their responses. The AI engine maps answers to DigComp 2.2 proficiency levels across all five competence areas.

strings.source: Adaptive questioning across all 21 DigComp 2.2 competences
strings.value: Adaptive questioning across all 21 DigComp 2.2 competences

strings.source: Personalised competence profile with proficiency level mapping
strings.value: Personalised competence profile with proficiency level mapping

strings.source: Actionable learning recommendations and resource suggestions
strings.value: Actionable learning recommendations and resource suggestions

strings.source: Progress tracking across multiple assessment sessions
strings.value: Progress tracking across multiple assessment sessions

strings.source: Educators receive an anonymised, real-time view of their class's digital competence profile — identifying where learners excel and where targeted support is needed. All data is privacy-by-design compliant.
strings.value: Educators receive an anonymised, real-time view of their class's digital competence profile — identifying where learners excel and where targeted support is needed. All data is privacy-by-design compliant.

strings.source: Competence gap identification across DigComp 2.2 areas
strings.value: Competence gap identification across DigComp 2.2 areas

strings.source: Exportable reports for institutional reporting and CPD planning
strings.value: Exportable reports for institutional reporting and CPD planning

strings.source: Tracking of learner progress over time
strings.value: Tracking of learner progress over time

strings.source: Built for Everyone in the Learning Ecosystem
strings.value: Built for Everyone in the Learning Ecosystem

strings.source: Take a personalised assessment to see exactly where you are across all 21 DigComp 2.2 competences. Get specific feedback and know what to work on next.
strings.value: Take a personalised assessment to see exactly where you are across all 21 DigComp 2.2 competences. Get specific feedback and know what to work on next.

strings.source: See Your Class at a Glance
strings.value: See Your Class at a Glance

strings.source: Access class-level dashboards showing aggregate competence data. Identify gaps early and plan targeted learning interventions grounded in real evidence.
strings.value: Access class-level dashboards showing aggregate competence data. Identify gaps early and plan targeted learning interventions grounded in real evidence.

strings.source: Use institution-level data to benchmark digital competence across cohorts, track year-on-year progress, and demonstrate impact to stakeholders and inspectorates.
strings.value: Use institution-level data to benchmark digital competence across cohorts, track year-on-year progress, and demonstrate impact to stakeholders and inspectorates.

strings.source: Access anonymised, aggregated research-quality data on digital competence trends across European education systems — informing evidence-based policy development.
strings.value: Access anonymised, aggregated research-quality data on digital competence trends across European education systems — informing evidence-based policy development.

strings.source: Register your institution to be among the first to pilot the DIGI-METER platform. We will contact you ahead of the platform launch to confirm participation and onboarding details.
strings.value: Register your institution to be among the first to pilot the DIGI-METER platform. We will contact you ahead of the platform launch to confirm participation and onboarding details.

strings.source: I agree to be contacted by the DIGI-METER consortium regarding platform access and agree to GDPR-compliant data processing. *
strings.value: I agree to be contacted by the DIGI-METER consortium regarding platform access and agree to GDPR-compliant data processing. *

strings.source: Our team reviews registrations and confirms eligibility based on institution type and geographic fit with pilot cohort design.
strings.value: Our team reviews registrations and confirms eligibility based on institution type and geographic fit with pilot cohort design.

strings.source: Selected institutions receive onboarding support, training materials, and dedicated contact from the piloting team ahead of the platform launch.
strings.value: Selected institutions receive onboarding support, training materials, and dedicated contact from the piloting team ahead of the platform launch.

strings.source: Your institution gains access to the full DIGI-METER platform for pilot testing, with dedicated support throughout the pilot period.
strings.value: Your institution gains access to the full DIGI-METER platform for pilot testing, with dedicated support throughout the pilot period.

strings.source: Measuring Digital Competence for Resilient Learning Ecosystems. An Erasmus+ Forward-Looking project.
strings.value: Measuring Digital Competence for Resilient Learning Ecosystems. An Erasmus+ Forward-Looking project.
